channel.title: 🪴 Astra's Digital Garden
channel.description: Last 10 notes on 🪴 Astra's Digital Garden

item.title: The Precipice
item.description: The music is freaky… Observations Lots of holes that look out off of cliff Clipboard under hard hat on crate: Whaaaat am I looking at… WHAAAAT Ohhhh interesting… so I know that rooms that I’ve been in have chess pieces… do i need to explore during the day, take note of what room is where, and then ...

item.title: The Grounds
item.description: After turning on 4 blue flames: Leads to “The Precipice” (Underground) ??.

item.title: Gemstone Cavern
item.description: Unlocked by solving the puzzle in the Utility Room Observations: Note Gas line :V in my personal first run, this was the 4th one i needed and it made a thing rise! .

item.title: Exhibit Security System
item.description: in: Closed Exhibit Stumbled upon exhibit security system in the hallway: OH DANG Reset only gives you 10 seconds to get to the crown before the tripwire comes back online OOF need to be smart about this to get that crown.

item.title: Office
item.description: Observations Computer Login w/ password “SWANSONG” Email from: Anne Babbage ⇒ next week ⇒ 06:12 11-01 to: DCPOWER ⇒ RE: RE: fusebox repair ⇒ 17:30 10-08 FOR THE Utility Room PUZZLE from: McMcMc ⇒ Changes to the Estate ⇒ 08:43 10-07 from DCPOWER ⇒ re: fusebox repair ⇒ 17:30 10-05 Note on desk about a...

item.title: Closed Exhibit
item.description: Observations Red crown Another Puzzle Change everything to red and corners open it also contributed to allowance Cardboard cutout guards Note .
